opening.name: Your Apartment
opening.description:
You are standing in your apartment. The parlour walls are alive with mindless chatter, their giant screens flickering with mindless entertainment. Your wife, Mildred, lies unconscious on the bed, her nightstand table cluttered with pill bottles.

Outside your window, the city burns. The electric beetles hum their eternal song. And in your hands, hidden in your firefighter's jacket, is a book that you cannot bring yourself to burn.

plaza_ho.name: Plaza Hotel
plaza_ho.description:
You are in a wide plaza in front of an old hotel. The building's facade is covered in the grime of decades. A fountain stands silent in the center, its basin cracked and dry.

The mechanical Hound patrols nearby, its eight legs clicking against the pavement. You can hear the constant hum of the city's electrical systems.

hospital.name: Hospital
hospital.description:
You are on the sidewalk of W57-58, in front of a hospital. Nearby is a phone booth.

This is the hospital. The hospital entrance slides open automatically, and you go in. Doctors, nurses, and orderlies walk rapidly and soundlessly on soft-soled shoes across the plastic antiseptic floor.

fountain.name: Central Fountain
fountain.description:
You stand beside a great fountain, once beautiful, now silent and dry. The city's heat makes you sweat.

The Mechanical Hound passes by, its nose twitching, sensing... something. You must be careful.

fifth_av.name: Fifth Avenue
fifth_av.description:
You are on Fifth Avenue, walking past the ruins of what was once the cultural heart of the city. Charred books still litter the gutters.

A television screen flickers with mindless entertainment. Seashell ear-thimbles seem glued to every citizen's ears.

phantasy.name: Phantasy Theater
phantasy.description:
You stand before the ruins of the Phantasy Theater. The sign still flickers with neon: SPEED! SEX! VIOLENCE! ACTION!

The Hound patrol passes by. Be careful. The city watches.

food_cen.name: Food Center
food_cen.description:
You are in a massive food processing center. The air is thick with the smell of synthetic nutrients and chemical flavoring.

Mechanical arms package the meals. No one cooks anymore. No one needs to.

bank.name: Bank
bank.description:
You are in the ruins of a bank. Nothing remains but a cracked safe and scattered papers.

The Mechanical Hounds have been here. The Hound Patrol has made its rounds.

jewelry.name: Jewelry Store
jewelry.description:
You stand in the ruins of a jewelry store. Glass crunches under your feet.

Somewhere nearby, you hear the clicking of Hound legs. Move carefully.

engraver.name: Engraver's Shop
engraver.description:
This was an engraver's shop. Now it lies in ruins, like so much of the city.

A tattered poster reads: BURN BURN BURN THE BOOKS BEFORE THEY BURN YOU

glass_wo.name: Glass Works
glass_wo.description:
You are in the ruins of a glass works. Beautiful shards of colored glass lie scattered among the ashes.

The fire that destroyed this place was either an accident or a warning.

walls_pa.name: Wall Display Parlor
walls_pa.description:
You stand before a Wall Display Parlor. Through the shattered window, you can see the giant screens that once filled homes with their parlour walls.

The screens are dark now. The power has been out for years.

magic_sh.name: Magic Shop
magic_sh.description:
This was a magic shop. Now only dust and broken tricks remain.

Somewhere in the distance, you hear the Hound patrol beginning its nightly rounds.

treatmen.name: Treatment Center
treatmen.description:
You are at a treatment center. Through the windows, you can see patients hooked up to machines, their minds scrubbed clean.

This is where they send those who remember too much.

headquar.name: Fire Department Headquarters
headquar.description:
You stand before the great marble building of the Fire Department. The salamander gleams on the facade.

This is where you work. This is where you serve. This is where you are supposed to burn the books.

But tonight... tonight is different.

tower.name: Watchtower
tower.description:
You climb to the roof of the Fire Department. From here, you can see the whole city burning.

The Hound patrol is on the move. They sense something wrong tonight. They are hunting.

office_b.name: Firefighter's Office
office_b.description:
You are in the Firefighter's Office. Your locker is here, your equipment stored neatly.

Your fellow firefighters are on patrol tonight. You are alone.

bookstor.name: Bookstore
bookstor.description:
You stand in the ruins of a bookstore. The ashes of a thousand books litter the floor.

But there, in the corner, you see it: a book that somehow survived the burning. A single copy of Shakespeare.

den_of_t.name: Den of Thieves
den_of_t.description:
You descend into a hidden basement. This is where the criminals hide: book smugglers, those who memorize forbidden texts, those who remember.

They eye you with suspicion. A firefighter? Here?

detentio.name: Detention Center
detentio.description:
You have stumbled into the Detention Center. The Hound patrol is here, interrogating prisoners.

You must leave. Now. Before they see you.

cathedra.name: Cathedral
cathedra.description:
You stand in the ruins of an ancient cathedral. Stained glass windows depicting forbidden saints have been smashed.

Somewhere, a choir is singing. The book people meet here.

walkway.name: Elevated Walkway
walkway.description:
You walk along an elevated walkway, high above the streets. The mechanical Hounds patrol below.

From here, you can see the Library in the distance.

lib_entr.name: Library Entrance
lib_entr.description:
You stand at the entrance to the great Library. The building is ancient, full of forbidden knowledge.

A sign reads: HERE LIE THE BOOKS THAT SHALL BURN.

This is where you are supposed to be. This is your assignment. But instead of burning...

lib_step.name: Library Steps
lib_step.description:
You climb the great steps of the Library. The doors have been welded shut, but there is another way.

Clarisse is here, watching. 'Montag,' she whispers. 'You've come.'

lib_firs.name: Library First Floor
lib_firs.description:
You are inside the Library. Books line every wall, every surface. The smell of paper and dust and knowledge fills the air.

This is what you were trained to burn. But now you understand why it must be saved.

lib_seco.name: Library Second Floor
lib_seco.description:
You climb to the second floor. The shelves here contain the most dangerous books: philosophy, poetry, the works that make people think.

Beatty is here. Captain Beatty. Your captain. Your enemy.

lib_rm_1.name: Library Room 1
lib_rm_1.description:
You enter a reading room. Books are stacked everywhere, in chairs, on tables, scattered like fallen leaves.

A woman sits here, memorizing a book. 'Each one of us is a book,' she whispers.

lib_rm_2.name: Library Room 2
lib_rm_2.description:
You are in a private study. The books here are the rarest, the most valuable.

You must make a choice: save what you can, or burn it all.

lib_roof.name: Library Roof
lib_roof.description:
You emerge onto the roof of the Library. The city burns below. Clarisse stands here, waiting.

'We must go,' she says. 'The Hounds are coming. There is only one way out: the subway tunnels beneath the city. But we must be quick.'

lib_guar.name: Library Guard Station
lib_guar.description:
You are at the guard station. The Mechanical Hound is here, its sensors scanning for contraband books.

If it detects you with the book in your possession...

in_hound.name: Inside the Hound Kennel
in_hound.description:
You have entered the Hound Kennel. The mechanical dogs rest in their charging stations, eight-legged nightmares of steel and poison.

The Hound activates. Its needle-tongue extends. It has detected you.

subway_s.name: Subway Entrance
subway_s.description:
You descend into the subway. The trains haven't run in years, but the tunnels remain. And somewhere in those tunnels, the book people live.

Clarisse takes your hand. 'Follow me,' she says. 'There's a train that still runs. It takes us out of the city.'

station_.name: Subway Station
station_.description:
You are in an abandoned subway station. The trains are dark, their destinations long forgotten.

But there, in the distance, you see a light. A train is coming.

subway_c.name: Subway Car
subway_c.description:
You climb aboard an ancient subway car. The door hisses shut behind you.

Clarisse pulls a lever. The train lurches forward, carrying you away from the burning city, toward a new life among the book people.

basement.name: Underground Bunker
basement.description:
You descend into an underground bunker. This is where the book people store their treasures: books they have memorized, books they have saved from the flames.

They welcome you here. You are one of them now.

undergro.name: Underground Home
undergro.description:
You are in the underground home of the book people. Men and women sit in circles, each one reciting a different book from memory.

This is how they save the books: not on paper, but in people. Living books. The only safe books.

radiatio.name: Radiation Zone
radiatio.description:
You have entered the radiation zone. The city burns behind you. Ahead lies only ruin.

But there is still hope. As long as there are people who remember the books, the books can never truly die.

phone_bo.name: Phone Booth
phone_bo.description:
You are in a phone booth. The phone is dead, but you notice something: a piece of paper with a number written on it.

It reads: PHONE NYC-451.

restauran.name: Restaurant
restauran.description:
You stand in the ruins of a restaurant. The kitchen is silent, the ovens cold.

A TV set flickers in the corner, showing the same mindless entertainment that fills every home.

think_ta.name: Thinking Spot
think_ta.description:
You stand in a small park. A bench reads: STOP. THINK. BE SILENT.

This is a thinking spot. Places like this were outlawed long ago. Only the old ones remember them.
